title: FDA's Makary to resign after Secretary Kennedy signs off
snippet: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary intends to resign on Tuesday, according to several sources. This report follows a tumultuous 13-month tenure in which Makary oversaw the controversial rejections of several rare disease drugs and “predictable volatility” within the agency.

title: Biotech’s IPO tide is finally turning, thanks in part to the recent M&A surge
snippet: After years of suffering from a bear market and more than 14 months of geopolitical turmoil shaking the macroenvironment, biotech appears to be moving on.

title: BMS, Hengrui build 13-asset pipeline in $15B+ onco-immune deal
snippet: Of the 13 programs that the companies will advance, four will come from Hengrui Pharma and four from Bristol Myers Squibb. The remaining five assets will be jointly discovered.

title: BridgeBio stands up to Pfizer in ATTR-CM as late-stage data hint at better survival
snippet: Indirect comparisons between BridgeBio’s Attruby and Pfizer’s tafamidis products showed a numerical survival benefit with the biotech’s drug.

title: FDA turns to old drugs to address new diseases, persistent medical needs
snippet: The FDA is looking to retool drugs with sufficient evidence to support their use in other indications, particularly those with unmet need.

title: Critical evaluation of drug response prediction models with DrEval.
snippet: Large-scale drug sensitivity screens have enabled training drug response prediction models based on cancer cell line omics profiles to advance personalized medicine. While model performances reported in the literature appear promising, successful translation to the clinic remains limited. In this work, we discuss key obstacles that lead to overly optimistic...

title: Exploring key biomarkers associated with axillary lymph node metastasis in breast cancer using single-cell RNA sequencing and Mendelian randomization.
publicationName: The International journal of biological markers
journalName: The International journal of biological markers
snippet: BackgroundAxillary lymph node metastasis (ALNM) serves as a critical prognostic determinant in breast cancer, yet the molecular drivers governing lymphatic dissemination remain poorly characterized. Integrating single-cell transcriptomic profiling with Mendelian-randomization (MR)-based genetic prioritization may help reveal cell type-specific mechanisms un...

title: Copper transporters promote the malignant progression of glioblastoma by regulating the immunosuppressive tumour microenvironment via the SLC31A1-WNT5A axis.
snippet: The prognosis for patients with glioblastoma (GBM) remains extremely poor, a challenge largely attributable to the complex nature of its malignant progression and an insufficient understanding of the dynamic plasticity and spatial heterogeneity inherent in the tumour microenvironment during invasion. In recent years, copper has emerged as a trace element of...

title: Identification of METTL3 and PRMT5 as an oncogenic pair for the prognosis and therapeutic targets of colorectal cancer subtype.
snippet: METTL3 is a pivotal N6-methyladenosine (m⁶A) regulator that is linked to a worse prognosis of colorectal cancer (CRC). However, METTL3's oncogenic molecular networks in CRC remain unclear. This study aims to establish a co-expression network of METTL3 and identify novel diagnostic and therapeutic targets for CRC. We integrated transcriptomic datasets...

title: Pancreatic tumor microenvironment reprogramming via alloantigen-expressing virotherapy elicits tumor rejection and improves immunotherapy response.
snippet: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), the most common malignant type of pancreatic cancer, is characterized by a dense desmoplastic stroma, low neoantigen burden, and a highly immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We present a novel strategy harnessing acute transplant rejection mechanisms by employing a recombinant oncolytic rVMG vector engine...
